scope: bounded pure uBLK started-export service-loop source model for queue/tag generation, queue bounds, completion outcomes, and unsupported opcode handling; no live daemon proof
residual_risk: The started-export service-loop fixture is source-model evidence only. Runtime started-export admission, qemu execution, fio, mkfs or mount acceptance, online resize, crash durability, multi-queue scaling, and production block-device readiness remain outside this manifest.
